title: orchis patens var. fallax
intro: Orchis patens var. fallax, also known as the yellow-fringed orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. In herbal preparations, the root of the yellow-fringed orchid is typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule supplement.
